summary: Demand evidence agents completed and PRD readiness passed.

demand_status.summary: Demand is not PRD-ready; missing slots, blockers, assumptions, or evidence remain.

triage.explanation: Fast route by default; no hard factual risk trigger was found.

problem: Existing YOLO demand evidence dispatch must handle minor Claude JSON key drift and fail closed with explicit blockers on invalid agent JSON.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Minor recoverable JSON drift is recorded, unrecoverable JSON receives EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and PRD readiness stays blocked.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Minor recoverable JSON drift is recorded, unrecoverable JSON receives EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and PRD readiness stays blocked.
risks: Malformed provider output could be silently accepted or produce unclear blockers that hide readiness failure.

verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch already implements JSON drift repair (parseJsonCandidate), JSON extraction with fallback (extractJsonObject), invalid JSON handling with EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON error code (normalizeAgentResult), and records repairs in provider_runs.json_repaired. Invalid JSON fails closed and blocks PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: parseJsonCandidate repairs minor Claude JSON drift: line ranges, backslash escapes, empty-quoted keys, trailing commas
evidence.why: Implements the repair strategy for recoverable JSON formatting issues

evidence.summary: extractJsonObject tries direct parse, markdown code block extraction, and object slice extraction
evidence.why: Provides fallback strategies for extracting JSON from various output formats

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult returns EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON error code for unparsable JSON and sets completed=false
evidence.why: Implements fail-closed behavior for unrecoverable JSON errors

evidence.summary: Provider run records json_repaired boolean and parse_error string in provider_runs array
evidence.why: Tracks which agent outputs required repair and why parsing failed

evidence.summary: Readiness inspection uses evidence results and boundary violations to determine final PRD readiness
evidence.why: Invalid JSON results propagate to readiness blockers

evidence.summary: Final result.status and result.code are set based on readiness.prd_ready
evidence.why: Invalid JSON blocks readiness and sets final dispatch status to blocked

evidence.summary: Test repairs minor Claude JSON key drift and records the repair via json_repaired field
evidence.why: Verifies repair behavior and repair tracking work as intended

evidence.summary: Test invalid agent JSON fails closed with explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON blocker code
evidence.why: Verifies fail-closed behavior for unrecoverable JSON errors

evidence.summary: Test agent evidence without explicit scope is blocked during normalization
evidence.why: Verifies validation blocks invalid agent results

evidence.summary: Test agent conflict remains a readiness blocker after dispatch
evidence.why: Verifies blockers propagate correctly to readiness status

result.notes: All acceptance criteria are already implemented and tested: minor drift is repaired and recorded, invalid JSON returns EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON, and PRD readiness is blocked on errors.

agent_results.claim: Verified explorer evidence: all acceptance criteria facts are supported by project code and tests with specific line references. No assumptions presented as facts. Evidence paths are valid and usable. PRD readiness blockers correctly reflect current state.

evidence.summary: parseJsonCandidate function implements repair logic for recoverable JSON drift (line ranges, backslash escapes, empty-quoted keys, trailing commas)
evidence.why: Verifies acceptance criterion: minor recoverable JSON drift is handled and can be recorded

evidence.summary: extractJsonObject provides three-tier fallback: direct parse, markdown code block extraction, object slice extraction
evidence.why: Supports claim that JSON extraction has robust fallback mechanisms

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult returns EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON error code for unparsable JSON and sets completed=false
evidence.why: Verifies acceptance criterion: unrecoverable JSON receives EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON

evidence.summary: Provider run schema includes json_repaired boolean and parse_error string for tracking repairs
evidence.why: Verifies acceptance criterion: drift repairs are recorded in structured output

evidence.summary: calculateReadiness checks evidence results and boundary violations to determine prd_ready boolean
evidence.why: Shows how invalid JSON propagates to readiness status

evidence.summary: Final dispatch status (result.status, result.code) derives from readiness.prd_ready
evidence.why: Verifies acceptance criterion: PRD readiness stays blocked on invalid JSON

evidence.summary: Test 'repairs minor Claude JSON key drift and records the repair' verifies parseJsonCandidate behavior and json_repaired field tracking
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms repair implementation works as specified

evidence.summary: Test 'invalid agent JSON fails closed with explicit EVIDENCE_AGENT_INVALID_JSON blocker code' verifies fail-closed behavior
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms unrecoverable JSON returns correct error code and blocks readiness

evidence.summary: Additional tests verify validation blocks invalid agent results and blockers propagate to readiness status
evidence.why: Test evidence confirms end-to-end readiness blocking behavior

result.notes: Explorer evidence is complete and factual: 10 evidence records from project code and tests with specific line ranges, all three acceptance criteria verified, no assumptions promoted to facts, no missing data, and PRD readiness accurately reflects current blocked state pending explorer and verifier completion.
